channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: 24” pothole, 2nd June
item.description:
Pothole on strip of tarmac between pavement & hedge opposite Green junction box

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gambles Lane, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gulleys blocked and very slow to drain, 2nd June
item.description:
The gulleys on both sides of the entrance to Barlow road are blocked and very slow to drain. Large puddles appear when it rains. There is always a lot of branch and leaf debris from the silver birch trees on the Cheltenham Borough Homes site that builds up on the pavement and edge of the road which then enters & blocks the nearby gulleys. They don't get cleaned out during regular maintenance presumably due to parked vehicles.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-4, Barlow Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked gully SRN side princes street, 2nd June
item.description:
Drain on Princes Street, Sydenham Road North end, round the corner from the post box, is full of debris and backing up - due to lack of other gullies (highways drainage engineer aware) it is then pouring water down into Victoria Terrace (known for flooding) - water was 6ft in road this time. Please can be cleared again as this one (and one round corner by letter box) are critical to stop Victoria Terrace flooding. Rob Gill CBC Flood Warden, Fairview.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Victoria Terrace, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The drain is blocked problem, 2nd June
item.description:
Drain is completely blocked and there is standing water that small vehicles (small to average size cars) are having a hard time getting through. Please can the drains/gulleys be cleared here?
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Surface water drains are blocked on Mendip road, 2nd June
item.description:
Surface water drains outside 24 Mendip road are blocked. This is causing surface water drains to back up on to driveways

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Mendip Road, Lynworth, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The drain is blocked problem, 2nd June
item.description:
Blocked drain is causing issues in the road. Worse whenever it rains. There is a puddle around the drain.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain outside 53 London Road is blocked, when it rains hard the water runs down pavement and potential to flood basement flat., 2nd June
item.description:
The drain outside 53 London Road Cheltenham GL52 6HF is blocked with leaves and is not coping with heavy rain.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 53, London Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The drain at the bottom of Ham Hill and across from Ham Lane is Blocked, 2nd June
item.description:
The location is the drain across from the Post Box at the bottom of Ham Hill and across from Ham Lane is blocked. It is likely that drains up Ham Hill are also blocked. Muddy water from Ham Hill (a lot!) is coming down Ham Lane very fast - with the current heavy rain. Please can these drains be cleared as soon as possible as the Ham Lane road is actually being eroded in places.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Ham Road, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain making access road inaccessible on foot, 2nd June
item.description:
Located on the back access lane/alley that comes off of great Norwood street and behind the houses on upper bath street. Has been blocked for a while now. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Great Norwood Street, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ridiculously huge puddles on new crossing, 2nd June
item.description:
The crossing that is at Central Cross Drive/ Evesham Road- every time it rains, it’s impossible for pedestrians to cross the road without having to wade through the huge puddles or be splashed by passing vehicles. Admittedly the rain was very heavy but the problem was excessive this afternoon especially with small children at school pick up from Dunalley.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Central Cross Drive, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Flooding difficult to drive through, 2nd June
item.description:
The drains on Glebe Road are blocked causing serious flooding making the road very difficult to access.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 327, Prestbury Road, Lynworth, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 2nd June
item.description:
Gullies blocked. After heavy rains road has flooded causing it to overspill into nearby primary school field. jet out gullies (Blocked Gully/Kerb Offlet)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drains, 2nd June
item.description:
The drain outside 49 and 48 Marle hill parade is blocked

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 49, Marle Hill Parade, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The drain is blocked problem, 2nd June
item.description:
Drains are full and now flooding the school fields. They had an issue with this last year. Road has been closed in the past for this reason. May need sandbags if possible.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several potholes at same location again, 2nd June
item.description:
Several potholes that all need fixing ( again ! ) at junstion of vicarge road and mill lane brockworth
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Mill Lane, Brockworth, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Whole road is flooded, 2nd June
item.description:
The drains in the vicinity of 63 Queens Road are all blocked and the road is completely flooded

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37, Eldorado Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 2nd June
item.description:
Pothole CW 500x500x40mm approx 3 way stop and go X 2 NSD Stats (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bollard shell is damaged/vandalised (Non illuminating bollard or post) problem, 2nd June
item.description:
PERM - Knocked Over Bollard - Afternoon Ade, Could you raise a perm repair enquiry for the below job please for the AHR. Thank you - 22114767/43120554
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Bollard shell is damaged/vandalised (Non illuminating bollard or post)

item.title: Overflowing Bin, 2nd June
item.description:
The bin at ///balconies.football.sensibly is overflowing - rubbish on the football pitches. Note - I saw this yesterday (1/6/26) so it may already have been emptied.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Innsworth Lane, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 2nd June
item.description:
Overgrown tree. Please cut back low hanging branches 10m Standard TM with temp FW closure (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet
